title: Fix 5 specification gaps in floreo SKILL.md
description:
1. Haiku prompt has unfilled [paste...] placeholders
2. Content Plan table section format underspecified (add worked example)
3. No file naming/output location guidance
4. No lower bound - when NOT to invoke floreo
5. No update protocol for existing floreo documents
close_reason: Fixed all 5 spec gaps: Haiku prompt placeholder clarified with angle-bracket convention + warning, Content Plan table/figure format with worked examples, file naming convention + docs/ default, min threshold (2-of-4 rule) + explicit do-not-use list, update protocol (read→plan→regenerate→v2 suffix)

title: Fix 5 CSS bugs in floreo SKILL.md
description:
1. Table border-radius broken by border-collapse (move border/radius/overflow to .tbl-w)
2. Hardcoded colors in .warn/.tip violate CSS variable rule (add --cw-bg/--cw/--cg-bg/--cg tokens)
3. Spacing vars --s1-s8 documented but missing from :root block
4. Type scale vars --t-xs through --t-4xl documented but missing from :root
5. .eyebrow and .subtitle referenced in skeleton but have no styles
close_reason: Fixed all 5 CSS bugs: border-radius/border-collapse split to .tbl-w, warn/tip hardcoded colors → --cw/--cg tokens, .eyebrow/.subtitle added, spacing/type scale vars in :root, code block pre-wrap

title: Build floreo skill SKILL.md
description: Create the core floreo skill file that instructs agents to produce beautiful self-contained HTML documentation. Covers philosophy, HTML structure, CSS system, SVG, JS, and two-phase Haiku orchestration.
close_reason: Created skills/floreo/SKILL.md with full skill spec: HTML philosophy, two-phase Haiku orchestration, design system, CSS token block, SVG/JS guidelines, component library, and Haiku subagent prompt template
